Document:
## Follow the rules of escalation.
Follow escalation rules against non-hostiles.\nDon't instantly murder someone for annoying you, use common sense.
- Always give verbal warnings before resorting to violence. - Only use as much force to disable the other person. - Make an effort to heal them or bring them to medical personnel. - You can defend yourself to the extent of protecting your own life, if the attacker is not a hostile force. - Military Police should use less-lethal force to effect arrests of criminals. - Adminhelp the situation if you think someone is over-escalating.
### Extreme Circumstances
Combat escalation does not apply to individuals who seek to do harm and/or grief the game and its community, should such an instance happen.\nFor example, "raider" shootings.
- All means of stopping the individual are allowed and an ahelp MUST be sent to notify the Admin Team. (Do not wait for someone else to do it.) - Any action taken by the individual is to be disregarded as though they never existed. - All players are held liable for their actions; should this clause be found to be used maliciously or in bad faith, the players will be actioned upon as appropriate.
